headline: ICE to Launch Economic Indicator Futures Contracts
summary: LONDON & NEW YORK, June 29, 2026--Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE), one of the world's leading providers of financial market technology and data powering global capital markets, today announced the planned launch of its first economic indicator futures contracts tied to global monetary policy decisions and US natural gas storage reports.
